embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

embedding.baseUrl.label: Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Base URL for compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1)

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions for custom models (required for non-standard models)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

coreMemory.enabled.label: Core Memory
coreMemory.enabled.help: Inject core memories as virtual MEMORY.md at session start (replaces MEMORY.md file)

coreMemory.maxEntries.label: Max Core Entries
coreMemory.maxEntries.help: Maximum number of core memories to load

coreMemory.minImportance.label: Min Core Importance
coreMemory.minImportance.help: Minimum importance threshold for core memories (0-1)
